responsibilities: Fine-tune and adapt large language models for domain-specific applications using LoRA, QLoRA, and full fine-tuning
Build and optimize inference serving infrastructure to deploy LLMs at low latency and high throughput in production
Implement distributed training pipelines across multi-GPU and multi-node clusters using DeepSpeed and Megatron-LM
Quantize and compress large language models to reduce memory footprint while preserving output quality
Design and execute RLHF and instruction-tuning pipelines to align model behavior with desired outcomes
Architect retrieval-augmented generation systems that integrate vector search with LLM inference for grounded responses
Develop comprehensive evaluation suites to benchmark model accuracy, latency, and cost across LLM versions
Monitor and troubleshoot production LLM systems, diagnosing issues related to hallucination, latency, and drift
Collaborate with research teams to integrate emerging architectures and training techniques into production systems
Manage GPU cluster resource allocation and cost optimization for large-scale model training and serving
